summary: 345 test specifications defined across 8 layers (revised from 309). 256 feature/API/entity/UI tests (219 P1, 34 P2, 3 P3), 43 integration scenarios (37 P1, 6 P2), 46 runtime safety specs (44 P1, 2 P2). Updated for refactoring: 'Project' terminology, requirements panel (replacing board), hierarchical requirements document, two project types (software/non-software), removed merge/similarity functionality.

critical_risks: AI function calling infinite loops (Facilitator max 3 rounds, Requirements Structure Agent max 10 rounds)
AI fabrication in requirements document generation (highest risk agent)
Cross-project context isolation (AI must never leak data between projects)
Project state machine integrity (5 states, 8 valid transitions, many invalid paths)
Rate limit counter accuracy under concurrent access
AI processing abort-and-restart on new message (no partial state)
Context re-indexing atomicity (old chunks preserved until new chunks succeed)
WebSocket connection lifecycle (leaks, reconnection, idle timeout)
Two project types (software/non-software) with different requirement structures
Hierarchical requirements document JSON structure validation

revision_notes.reason: Major refactoring: Idea → Project, Brainstorming → Requirements Assembly, Board → Requirements Panel

changes.terminology: All references updated from 'idea' to 'project', 'brainstorming' to 'requirements structuring', 'BRD' to 'Requirements Document'
changes.removed_features: Board/canvas (XYFlow), merge/similarity system, keyword matching, board agent, merge synthesizer
changes.added_features: Requirements panel (structured accordion), project types (software/non-software), hierarchical requirements document, update_requirements_structure AI tool
changes.test_matrix: Updated fixture builders, removed board/merge tests, added requirements panel tests
changes.integration_scenarios: Removed board/merge scenarios, added requirements panel interaction scenarios
changes.runtime_safety: Removed board agent tests, updated requirements structure mutation testing

next_commands.command: /strategy_planner Read handover at docs/04-test-architecture/handover.json. All specs and test architecture ready for milestone planning.
next_commands.description: Start milestone planning and wave strategy
